parameters.formDescription: Generate a comic reel and upload it to TikTok drafts. Pick a style and mode, or leave on Random.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.IDEA_LLM_MODEL || 'ai/llama3.2', max_tokens: 150, temperature: 1, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $('Init run').first().json.ideaSystem }, { role: 'user', content: 'Invent a fresh premise. Avoid clichés. Run seed: ' + $('Init run').first().json.runid }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Init run').first().json.model, max_tokens: 150, temperature: 1, system: $('Init run').first().json.ideaSystem, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Invent a fresh premise. Avoid clichés. Run seed: ' + $('Init run').first().json.runid }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Init run').first().json.model, max_tokens: 500, system: $('Init run').first().json.sceneSystem, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Story: "' + $json.title + '" — ' + $json.tagline + '\nScene ' + ($json.index + 1) + ' of ' + $json.panel_count + ': ' + $json.beat }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: $json.prompt, image_size: $('Init run').first().json.imageSize, num_images: 1, enable_safety_checker: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: $json.musicMood + ', instrumental, no vocals — ' + $json.title + ': ' + $json.tagline, duration: Math.min($json.panel_count * $json.panelSeconds, 380), output_format: 'wav' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ source_info: { source: 'FILE_UPLOAD', video_size: $('Parse render').first().json.size, chunk_size: $('Parse render').first().json.size, total_chunk_count: 1 } }) }}
